name: Chocolate Macadamia Nut Cookies
directions: In a large bowl; cream butter, sugar and vanilla.
Add egg.
Mix together dry ingredients; add to creamed mixture.
Mix well.
Fold in chocolate chips and nuts.
Drop by teaspoons on greased sheets.
Bake at 350°F degrees for 10 minutes or until golden.
Glaze---.
Melt caramels and cream.
Drizzle over cooled cookies.

name: White Chocolate Macadamia Nut Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 375.
Mix all dry ingredients together in a separate bowl.
In a large bowl, cream butter and sugars until fluffy.
Add vanilla and egg to butter/sugar mixture; Mix well.
Slowly add dry ingredients to butter/sugar mixture; mix well.
Add chocolate and nuts.
Use a small or medium ice cream scoop to spoon onto lightly greased cookie sheets. (I spray it with Pam).
Bake 8-12 minutes, depending on size of cookies, they should not brown but be more of a golden color.
Cool on rack. Enjoy with a cold glass of milk!

similar.name: Chocolate Macadamia Nut and White Chocolate Chip Cookies

name: Deluxe Chocolate Macadamia Nut Cookies
directions: Cream together butter, sugar, eggs and vanilla.
Put the oatmeal in the blender 1-2 cups at a time and blend to a flour-like consistancy.
Combine the dry ingredients together.
Mix wet and dry ingredients together.
Stir in the chocolates and the nuts and mix well.
Make into 1" size balls and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake at 375 for 7-8 minutes. Tops will be golden.
Cookies will seem doughy, but they will firm up after cooling. Longer than 8 minutes of cooking time will make them tough.

name: White Chocolate Macadamia Nut Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 375°F.
Mix flour, baking soda & salt set aside.
beat butter, both sugars, & egg until fluffy & stir in dry ingredients.
Gently stir in white chocolate and nuts.
Drop by tablespoonfuls on an ungreased baking sheet (use more than one if needed) a few inches apart.
Bake 8-10 minutes or until golden brown.

name: White Chocolate Macadamia Nut Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
In a large bowl, cream together the butter, shortening, brown sugar, and white sugar until smooth.
Beat in each egg, one at a time. Then, stir in the vanilla and almond extracts.
Combine the flour, baking soda, and salt. Whisk together, and then gradually add to the creamed mixture (add in 2 or 3 parts).
Mix in the macadamia nuts and white chocolate. If you like the cookies chunky, add plenty of extra white chocolate/nuts.
Drop the dough by the tablespoonful onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake for 7-10 minutes, depending on how soft you would like the cookies to be.

similar.name: Chocolate Macadamia Nut and White Chocolate Chip Cookies

name: Chocolate Macadamia Nut and White Chocolate Chip Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Beat butter and shortening in large bowl until well blended.  Add brown sugar and granulated sugar; beat thoroughly.
Add egg and vanilla, beating well.
In a separate bowl, mix together flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.  Gradually beat the dry ingredients into the butter mixture.  Stir in the bag of baking chips.
Drop by rounded teaspoons onto ungreased cookie sheet.  Bake 10-12 minutes, or until set but slightly moist in the middle.  Cool slightly; remove from cookie sheet to wire rack.

name: White Chocolate Macadamia Nut Cookies
directions: Heat oven to 325.
Place 1 cup of the baking chips in 2 cup microwavable measuring cup.
Microwave uncovered on medium 3 to 4 minutes or until chips are softened.
Stir chips until smooth; cool.
Beat sugar, butter, vanilla and eggs in large bowl with electric mixer on medium speed until creamy.
Beat in melted chips on low speed.
Stir in flour, baking soda and cream of tarter.
Stir in remaining 2/3 cup white chocolate chips and the nuts.
Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto ungreaded cookie sheet.
Bake 10 to 12 muntes or until very light brown.
Cool 2 minutes; remove from cookie sheet to wire rack.

similar.name: Chocolate Macadamia Nut and White Chocolate Chip Cookies

name: Coconut Macadamia Nut Cookies
directions: Beat together butter, brown sugar, sugar, eggs, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
Beat in flour, baking soda, and salt until a stiff dough forms.
Stir in coconut and macadamia nuts.
Drop by rounded spoonfuls onto parchment-lined cookie sheets.
Bake at 375 degrees for10 minutes.

name: White Chocolate Macadamia Nut Cookies
directions: Preheat oven to 325°F.
In a food processor turn the oats into powder. In a mixing bowl sift together the oats, flour, baking soda, and salt.
In a large bowl beat the butter until fluffy and gradually beat in both types of sugar; then slowly beat in egg, milk, vanilla and almond extract.
Gradually beat into the butter mixture the dry flour mixture untill well combined. Stir in chocolate and nuts.
Drop by spoonful on well greased or parchment lined cookie sheets and bake for 12-17 minutes.
